title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie and Stanford meet Lynn Cameron, an old friend, who is producing a New York fashion show featuring real models. Subsequently, she insists Carrie model in the show for her.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony requests a favour from Johnny Sack on behalf of his cousin. Meanwhile, Adriana asks the FBI for assistance, followed by a request to Chris.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony realises that he must handle family issues to maintain peace within his own clan.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony reviews a colleague's retirement request. Meanwhile, Hesh attempts to get compensation for an injustice done to his son-in-law.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: The family tries to cope with Tony's hospitalisation and deteriorating condition. Meanwhile, Tony begins to hallucinate a new life parallel to his own.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Silvio divides the spoils of Paulie's new stint and later, suffers a critical asthma attack. As the family begins to slowly crack from the inside, Vito sees himself as a potential new leader.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony goes home and returns to business with a new frame of mind. Meanwhile, Paulie receives a shock news about his mother.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: When the quartet is invited to an engagement party, Carrie and Miranda feel like outcasts. Meanwhile, Samantha interacts with a television agent, but soon switches her attention to a Franciscan.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Faded television starlet Valerie Cherish attempts to land a role in a new sitcom, Room and Bored, by taking part in a reality show chronicling her somewhat mortifying comeback.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: The cast flies to New York City to introduce the media to Aunt Sassy and her attractive charges. As that happens, the ever bubbly Valerie gets a reality check on just how far her star has fallen.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Daenerys apprehends the leaders of Meereen's great families, while Jon confronts a challenging decision. Later, Theon must face Sansa.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Arya is put to the test, while Tyrion and Jorah are cunningly captured by slavers. Later, Loras Tyrell is judged by the Sparrows.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda is dating Doug, a respected professional, but just can't get comfortable with his loose sense of toilet intimacy. Meanwhile, On a 'non-date' with Mr. Big Carrie meet Jazz musician Ray King.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie has another date with Ray King at his place and confesses she does not really like jazz, because it makes no sense. Later, she tells the girls she had the most intense orgasm in her life.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: After a table read for the first official episode, Valerie invites her young costars to a bonding meal, but Juna doesn't show up. However, the two make up later with personal lunch.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie fights to change a potentially offensive line written for Aunt Sassy.

title: Elementary
subTitle: A mathematician who was trying to decipher a highly guarded equation is murdered; a former patient's son asks Watson for a loan.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon heads east as trouble begins to stir for Sam and Gilly at Castle Black. Meanwhile, Cersei savours her triumph over the Tyrells as new plots develop in the shadows.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Sansa compels Theon to reveal a secret while Cersei maintains her stubbornness. Furthermore, Jon and Tormund convene with the wildling elders.

subTitle: Samantha's lover Warren is great in all aspects, but addicted to something the quartet hates. Meanwhile, Miranda finds an attractive man while training for the marathon.

subTitle: Charla from the popular show 'The Amazing Race' guest stars on 'The Comeback', causing anxious Valerie unexpected stress.

subTitle: With the cast in a funk following Room and Bored's lacklustre premiere, Valerie tries to boost morale with a late-night cookie delivery.

subTitle: Holmes and Watson search for a civil contractor who leaked classified information, but their lives are disrupted by a group of cyberactivists determined to protect the contractor; Joan signs up for an online dating service.

subTitle: Jon and the wildlings return to Castle Black and Jaime meets with Doran Martell. Meanwhile, Daenerys attends the grand reopening of the fighting pits.

subTitle: Miranda believes she has been stood up until she learns her date died of a heart attack. Later, she agrees to go to the wake and meets a man who used to date Carrie.

subTitle: Distressed by a hateful glance from Natasha, who observes the quartet in a restaurant, Carrie becomes disoriented and falls victim to theft.

subTitle: Carrie and Samantha address issues with disruptive neighbours. Meanwhile, Miranda fears that the takeaway attendant laughs at her for placing single-person orders.

subTitle: Drama tries to get Andrew Dice Clay back on his show while Vince does a Vanity Fair interview. Later, Ari has an awkward meeting with Dana Gordon.

subTitle: Vince tries to make things right with journalist Sophia Lear while Ari gets a reality check about his divorce. Later, Turtle meets with his East Coast partners on a new venture.

subTitle: The DeLucas fall in love with a pricey restaurant space, forcing Turtle to pitch his investors for more money. Meanwhile, distraught over Sloan, Eric turns to Melinda.

subTitle: After a first date, Vince pulls out all the stops for Sophia. Later, Drama, Turtle and Vince try to convince Sloan to give Eric another chance.

subTitle: Sherlock and Joan find themselves caught in Moriarty's crosshairs once again.
